summary: Created performance benchmarks for opencode-skill-rl-manager at 92-skill scale. 4 perf tests: _matchesContext (100 iter x 92 skills < 1ms avg), querySkills (100 iter < 5ms avg), selectSkills (100 iter < 10ms avg), syncWithRegistry (10 iter < 100ms avg). 5 semantic gap verification tests confirming synonym expansion, domain signals, and app_context keyword matching work across debugging, devops, database, testing, and architecture categories. Full regression suite passes (bun test exit 0). All 3 governance scripts pass.
